name: aliyun-cloudfw
description: OctoBus package for Alibaba Cloud Cloud Firewall asset, address book, internet ACL, VPC ACL, and NAT ACL APIs.

aliyun.cloudfw.v1.AliyunCloudFWService/L.description: Query Alibaba Cloud Cloud Firewall assets.
